summary: List available Observation Item statuses with localized labels
description: Returns a collection of available statuses. When `id` is provided, only statuses that the user has permission to set for that specific observation item are returned . When `id` is not provided, all available statuses are returned without permission filtering.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Observation Item ID. When provided, returns only statuses the user can set for this specific observation item based on their permissions.
